title: Integrate voice UI into conversation screen

acceptance_criteria.AC-1: VoiceMicButton visible in header rightContent with testID='voice-mic-button' (hidden for /chat/new)
acceptance_criteria.AC-2: Tapping mic button calls startVoice(), VoiceSessionOverlay appears with absolute positioning above chat thread
acceptance_criteria.AC-3: Stop button in overlay calls stopVoice(), voiceState returns to 'idle', overlay unmounts
acceptance_criteria.AC-4: Voice transcripts are recorded to Convex via transcript-recorder in useVoiceSession; Convex reactivity surfaces them in useChatHistory
